name: playwright-flow-yaml-steps
description: PlaywrightFlowTool executes flows/<flow_name>.yaml step lists (goto, click, fill, wait_for_selector, wait_for_response, expect_status, expect_text) using Playwright's ASYNC API — required, not stylistic: BeeAI tools run inside the agent's asyncio loop and the sync Playwright API refuses to run with a loop already running. A response listener records every request/response; per-step failures are recorded, not raised, so later steps still run.
invariants: Unknown actions record status 'skipped_unknown_action' instead of failing the flow
expect_status/expect_text raise AssertionError internally, which lands in that step's {'status': 'failed', 'error': ...} entry
contracts: Returns JSON {flow_name, step_results, network_log} — the canonical flow-output shape shared with run_api_flow
